description: Create a logger utility in @quant/common that only logs in development, then replace all console.log/console.error in production app source code (35 files, ~90 occurrences). Keep console.error in error.tsx boundaries (intentional). Remove pure debug console.log calls entirely. Replace meaningful error logging with the logger.
steps: Create packages/common/src/logger.ts with a Logger class/object that exposes log(), warn(), error(), debug() methods. Each method checks process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' before outputting. In production, error() should still work (it's for real errors that ops needs). log/debug/warn should be suppressed in production. Export from packages/common/src/index.ts.

Files with console.log to REMOVE entirely (debug noise, placeholder actions): apps/quantai/src/app/voice/page.tsx (lines 17,20,23), apps/quantchat/src/app/page.tsx (line 48), apps/quantedits/src/hooks/useCollaboration.ts (lines 83,88), apps/quantedits/src/hooks/useExport.ts (line 187), apps/quantedits/src/pages/assets.tsx (lines 135,150), apps/quantedits/src/pages/export.tsx (line 152), apps/quantedits/src/pages/index.tsx (lines 241,245,249,253,260), apps/quantedits/src/pages/templates.tsx (line 136), apps/quantmail/src/app/page.tsx (line 34), apps/quantmax/src/hooks/useSpeedDating.ts (line 120), apps/quantmax/src/pages/challenges.tsx (line 89), apps/quantneon/src/pages/camera.tsx (line 28), apps/quantneon/src/pages/create.tsx (line 19). NOTE: console.log in string literals (like code samples in apps/quantai/src/pages/code.tsx lines 31,141,143) must NOT be touched - those are user-facing code examples.

Files with console.error to REPLACE with logger.error(): apps/quantchat/src/components/E2EEncryption.tsx, apps/quantchat/src/components/GroupChat.tsx (multiple catch blocks), apps/quantchat/src/components/StoryCreator.tsx, apps/quantchat/src/hooks/useStories.ts, apps/quantchat/src/pages/bitmoji.tsx, apps/quantchat/src/pages/memories.tsx, apps/quantchat/src/pages/settings.tsx, apps/quantchat/src/services/websocket-client.ts, apps/quantedits/src/hooks/useCanvas.ts, apps/quantmail/src/hooks/useDrive.ts, apps/quantmail/src/hooks/useGit.ts, apps/quantmail/src/pages/admin.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/calendar.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/contacts.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/drive.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/inbox.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/pipelines.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/repo/[id].tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/repos.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/security.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/thread/[id].tsx
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test to verify everything still passes.
acceptance_criteria: No console.log remaining in app source code (except in string literals/code samples)
All console.error in catch blocks replaced with logger.error()
Logger utility exists in @quant/common and is exported
Logger suppresses log/debug/warn in production, allows error() always
verification: grep -rn 'console\.log' apps/*/src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v __tests__ | grep -v 'test\.' | grep -v 'spec\.' | grep -v '\"' | grep -v "'" - should return zero results (excluding string literals)
findings: All 111 typecheck, 88 build, and 114 test tasks pass. No console.error remained outside error.tsx files. No console.log remained outside string literals. Used underscore-prefixed parameters (_id, _type, etc.) where removing console.log left unused parameters. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged hook during commit.
